mcps.name: Context7
mcps.description: Library and framework documentation lookup. Agents use this before writing code against any dependency.
mcps.degradedMessage: No live docs lookup. Agents rely on training data which may be outdated.

mcps.name: Sequential Thinking
mcps.description: Structured multi-step reasoning chains. Helps with complex planning and analysis.
mcps.degradedMessage: Complex reasoning chains unavailable. Agents still work but may skip structured thinking steps.

mcps.name: Memory
mcps.description: Persistent cross-session knowledge graph. Agents remember decisions and findings across sessions.
mcps.degradedMessage: No cross-session memory. Each session starts fresh with no prior context.

mcps.name: Playwright
mcps.description: Browser automation for E2E testing and web research.
mcps.degradedMessage: No browser automation. E2E tests and live web research unavailable.

mcps.name: GitHub
mcps.description: GitHub API: issues, PRs, code search, repository operations.
mcps.setupNote: Run 'gh auth login' to authenticate via browser, then re-run 'construct mcp add github'. Construct wires Claude Code and OpenCode directly. In Codex, use the built-in GitHub plugin/app path instead of a standalone GitHub MCP server.
mcps.degradedMessage: No GitHub API. Agents use gh CLI only — PR creation, issue tracking, code search limited.

mcps.name: Atlassian (Jira + Confluence)
mcps.description: Jira issue tracking and Confluence wiki access via Atlassian's official remote MCP server. OAuth is handled by each MCP client.
mcps.setupNote: Uses Atlassian's official remote MCP server with OAuth 2.1. Browser auth prompt appears on first use. Requires a Rovo license on your Atlassian account.
mcps.degradedMessage: No Jira/Confluence access. Issue tracking and wiki lookup must be done manually.

mcps.name: Linear
mcps.description: Linear issue tracking — create issues, update status, search projects.
mcps.setupNote: Generate a personal API key at linear.app/settings/api.
mcps.degradedMessage: No Linear access. Issue creation and sprint tracking must be done manually.

mcps.name: Slack
mcps.description: Slack messaging — send messages, read channels, search conversations.
mcps.setupNote: Create a Slack app at api.slack.com/apps. Add Bot Token Scopes: channels:read, chat:write, channels:history.
mcps.degradedMessage: No Slack integration. Deployment notifications and team alerts must be sent manually.

mcps.name: Notion
mcps.description: Notion workspace access — read/write pages, databases, and comments.
mcps.setupNote: Create an integration at notion.so/profile/integrations. Share target pages/databases with the integration.
mcps.degradedMessage: No Notion access. Documentation must be managed manually.

mcps.name: Filesystem
mcps.description: Extended file operations beyond built-in Read/Write/Edit tools.
mcps.degradedMessage: Using built-in file tools only. Some advanced file operations unavailable.
